tool_args.label: LIRR & Metro-North Key Performance Metrics December 2024
tool_args.raw_text: LONG ISLAND RAIL ROAD & METRO-NORTH RAILROAD KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS - December 2024 - Prepared for the December 2024 meeting of the Joint Long Island Rail Road & Metro-North Railroad Committees

payload.title: LONG ISLAND RAIL ROAD & METRO-NORTH RAILROAD KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS
payload.description: Key performance metrics report prepared for the December 2024 meeting of the Joint Long Island Rail Road & Metro-North Railroad Committees

evidence_refs.source_quote: This performance metrics document was prepared for the December 2024 meeting of the Joint Long Island Rail Road & Metro-North Railroad Committees.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: Long Island Rail Road
tool_args.raw_text: Long Island Rail Road is comprised of over 7,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. We operate 700 trains daily and maintain 125 stations, nearly 700 miles of track, and 27 shops and yards.

payload.description: Long Island Rail Road is comprised of over 7,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. We operate 700 trains daily and maintain 125 stations, nearly 700 miles of track, and 27 shops and yards.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Long Island Rail Road is comprised of over 7,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. We operate 700 trains daily and maintain 125 stations, nearly 700 miles of track, and 27 shops and yards.

tool_args.label: Metro-North Railroad
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North Railroad is comprised of nearly 6,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. We operate 700 trains daily and maintain 124 stations, nearly 900 miles of track, and 19 shops and yards.

payload.description: Metro-North Railroad is comprised of nearly 6,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. We operate 700 trains daily and maintain 124 stations, nearly 900 miles of track, and 19 shops and yards.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Metro-North Railroad is comprised of nearly 6,000 employees serving over 200,000 passengers a day. We operate 700 trains daily and maintain 124 stations, nearly 900 miles of track, and 19 shops and yards.

tool_args.label: Metropolitan Transportation Authority (MTA)
tool_args.raw_text: The Metropolitan Transportation Authority is North America's largest transportation network, serving a population of 15.3 million people across a 5,000 square-mile travel area.

payload.description: North America's largest transportation network, serving a population of 15.3 million people across a 5,000 square-mile travel area surrounding New York City through Long Island, southeastern New York State, and Connecticut.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The Metropolitan Transportation Authority is North America's largest transportation network, serving a population of 15.3 million people across a 5,000 square-mile travel area surrounding New York City through Long Island, southeastern New York State, and Connecticut.

tool_args.label: Grand Central Madison
tool_args.raw_text: Grand Central Madison receives accolades on a daily basis from those who visit the terminal, but now it's receiving recognition on an international scale. This month, Grand Central Madison was awarded UNESCO's 2024 Prix Versailles Interior Award in the World's Most Beautiful Station category.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Grand Central Madison receives accolades on a daily basis from those who visit the terminal

tool_args.label: LIRR MDBF October 2024
tool_args.raw_text: The fleet mean distance between failures, a metric that measures the average number of miles a railcar or locomotive travels before failing and causing a delay, operated at 215,986 miles in October, exceeding the target of 150,000 miles.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The fleet mean distance between failures, a metric that measures the average number of miles a railcar or locomotive travels before failing and causing a delay, operated at 215,986 miles in October, exceeding the target of 150,000 miles.

tool_args.label: Metro-North Service Delivered Rate November 2024
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North's service-delivered rate, a measure of service reliability in November was 99.9%.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Metro-North's service-delivered rate, a measure of service reliability in November was 99.9%. MDBF for the fleet was 462,916 miles in October 2024, above the goal of 200,000 miles. Year-to-date MBDF performance also remains above goal at 326,162 miles.

tool_args.label: LIRR Day of Giving December 11, 2024
tool_args.raw_text: On Wednesday, December 11th we held the Long Island Rail Road 'Day of Giving' so that our generous customers also had a convenient way to help those in need. At both Penn and Grand Central Madison our customers came through with donations of non-perishable food items for those less fortunate.

tool_args.label: Metro-North Holiday Lights Train Launch November 2024
tool_args.raw_text: Holiday Lights Train service began on the day after Thanksgiving, Friday, Nov. 29, and the train has traveled all over the Hudson, Harlem and New Haven Lines to resounding success

payload.description: Metro-North began its first-ever Holiday Lights Train service on the day after Thanksgiving, operating on all three East of Hudson lines through January 5.

tool_args.label: Garrison Station Improvements Press Conference December 2024
tool_args.raw_text: On Wednesday December 11, Governor Kathy Hochul praised the accomplishments of Metro-North at Garrison Station, with a press conference held inside of one of Metro-North's coaches.

payload.description: Governor Kathy Hochul joined MTA Chair Janno Lieber, Metro-North President Cathy Rinaldi, and local officials at Garrison Station to announce infrastructure improvements including platform edge replacements, new railings, tactile strips, expansion joints, and concrete repairs.

tool_args.label: LIRR Day of Giving December 11, 2024
tool_args.raw_text: And on Wednesday, December 11th we held the Long Island Rail Road \"Day of Giving\" so that our generous customers also had a convenient way to help those in need. At both Penn and Grand Central Madison our customers came through with donations of non-perishable food items for those less fortunate.

tool_args.label: Improving Passenger Flow at LIRR Jamaica Station
tool_args.raw_text: This month, LIRR and MTA Construction & Development are gearing up to remove the existing out-of-service moving walkway at Jamaica Station

payload.project_name: Improving Passenger Flow at LIRR Jamaica Station
payload.description: Removal and disposal of the existing out-of-service moving walkway at Jamaica Station, LIRR's busiest hub, including removal of all machinery, enclosures, handrails, steps, control systems. Area will be filled with concrete to match existing mezzanine flooring to improve passenger flow.

tool_args.label: New Haven Line Power Upgrades - Pelham Substation Replacement
tool_args.raw_text: This month, MTA Construction & Development are making progress on critical improvements to power supply capacity and resiliency of the DC traction power supply system on the New Haven Line.

payload.description: Replacement of the Pelham substation on the New Haven Line with a permanent fixed structure, including replacement of all necessary electrical, communications, and circuitry system equipment to improve power supply capacity and resiliency.

tool_args.label: Metro-North 2024 Accomplishments
tool_args.raw_text: We're hardening our railroad to be resistant to climate-change effects... eliminating speed restrictions... targeted operating efficiencies... completed the lengthy and complex overhaul... of Harmon Yard... reconstruct the Park Avenue Viaduct... industry leaders in using advanced train-scheduling software

payload.claim_text: Metro-North is hardening railroad against climate-change effects, eliminating speed restrictions, targeting operating efficiencies, completing Harmon Yard overhaul, reconstructing Park Avenue Viaduct, and using advanced train-scheduling software for infrastructure projects.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad accomplishments in 2024

evidence_refs.source_quote: Thinking back on the challenges and accomplishments of 2024, I'm struck by the catalogue of obstacles we overcame and improvements we've made to our infrastructure and our service.

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote is not present in the cited block

tool_args.label: LIRR November 22 Slip-Slide Incident
tool_args.raw_text: 8 incidents in November resulted in ten or more late, cancelled, or terminated trains. The most significant event occurred on November 22, when slip-slide conditions led to systemwide issues. The event caused 21 late trains, delayed our customers an average of 12 minutes and reduced our monthly OTP by less than one percent.

payload.claim_text: On November 22, slip-slide conditions led to systemwide LIRR issues, causing 21 late trains, delaying customers an average of 12 minutes, and reducing monthly OTP by less than one percent.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The most significant event occurred on November 22, when slip-slide conditions led to systemwide issues. The event caused 21 late trains, delayed our customers an average of 12 minutes and reduced our monthly OTP by less than one percent.

tool_args.label: Metro-North 2024 Accomplishments
tool_args.raw_text: We're hardening our railroad to be resistant to climate-change effects • We're eliminating speed restrictions on our railroad to reduce running times for our trains • We targeted operating efficiencies, new optimization technologies, and commenced on a journey to standardize our work here at Metro-North, all while reducing operating costs by millions of dollars through these initiatives. • We completed the lengthy and complex overhaul and rebirth of our largest mechanical facility at Harmon Yard • We've collaborated with MTA Construction & Development to employ innovative construction methods to reconstruct the Park Avenue Viaduct while maintaining a robust and frequent night-time and weekend service that's so crucial to our customers • We've been industry leaders in using advanced train-scheduling software to develop operating simulations to fine-tune schedules to support such highly invasive and crucial infrastructure projects as the diamond-crossover replacement project in the throat of Grand Central Terminal

payload.claim_text: Metro-North is hardening railroad against climate-change effects, eliminating speed restrictions, targeting operating efficiencies, completing the Harmon Yard overhaul, reconstructing the Park Avenue Viaduct, and using advanced train-scheduling software for infrastructure projects.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad accomplishments in 2024
